description: You are a Telecom Network Specialist at an enterprise solutions firm. Design a professional network infrastructure document for a university campus building complex in Wondershare EdrawMax. The document must include a physical/logical topology diagram on Page 1 and a structured IP Addressing Plan (detailing subnets, IP ranges, VLAN IDs, and device roles) on Page 2. The topology must incorporate a perimeter firewall, a core router with ISP connectivity, a core distribution layer switch, two access layer switches (one per building wing), a server farm zone with three server nodes (file, web, DNS/DHCP), four end-user devices, and two wireless access points, all connected with appropriate cabling or trunk links. Apply a professional color theme and save the final document to /home/ga/campus_network_topology
